title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as sanji becomes entangled with Violet while Law’s Green Bit exchange collapses into a trap involving Doflamingo and Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do you ever drop the Loved- Davey crap !!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gyaahh she's Merci- less!! But so beautiful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What a kick!! Go, big sis!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ridiculous ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: While suppressing your rage at me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Did you think you could convince me with these lies?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You've been looking for a chance to escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Slip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fufufu... lies won't work on me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I ate the "Giro Giro No mi"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and became an "insight human"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm a woman who can see through any- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Men are liars through and through

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Show me, won't you? That head ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Full of nothing but lies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That pose! Here it comes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why did TraFalgar Law and Strawhat join Forces?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What are your goals, both on green bit and on dressrossa?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The answers are all in your mind. We'll be able to round up your whole crew ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What sort of plans... What are you scheming? Don't bother speaking

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Peeping mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: MyAhhhh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WH-WH-WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH WH-WHAT'S WRONG!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Big Sis!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...DIS...!! Disgusting !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So disgusting !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I've never seen such an erotic mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Ehh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Your plans? What about your goals?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the hell are you thinking about at a time like this!!? ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...!! ONLY YOU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...that time... your eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's a man I want you to kill

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You were speaking the truth....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Twinge

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Even... Even if a million people denounced you ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I could never doubt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A woman's tears!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What kind of bullshit is that? You don't deserve to live!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Big Sis!! If this perverted bastard is no longer of any use, let us take care of him!!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
